questionHtml: Newton’s law of gravitation applies to point masses. Suggest why the law can be applied to a satellite orbiting a spherical planet of uniform density.
markschemeHtml: satellite has a much smaller mass/diameter/size than the planet «so approximates to a point mass» ✔

meta.title: Newton’s law of gravitation applies to point masses. Suggest why the law can be applied to a satellite orbiting a spherical planet of uniform density.
